arts.ttl: Arsenal risk losing new sporting director, Fabrizio Romano responds
arts.sum: The Transfers Podcast revealed this week that Andrea Berta had ended talks with AC Milan as he has received an offer to become Arsenal’s new sporting director. There are sensational reports that Arsenal could lose 'new' sporting director Andrea Berta to a last-minute hijack from AC Milan, but Fabrizio Romano has rejected the claims.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Arsenal LIVE: Premier League team news and line-up as rivals clash at Old Trafford
arts.sum: The Gunners must win at Old Trafford to keep their title hopes alive

arts.ttl: Arsenal in double team news hint for Man Utd as Mikel Arteta makes 'important' admission
arts.sum: The team news hints are also more likely to be true, considering Arsenal's injury woes under Arteta. Jorginho and Raheem Sterling are among the players who have posted pre-match graphics on their Instagram stories.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Man United's players' 'scars are TOO DEEP' for a quick fix
arts.sum: The Red Devils endure one of the worst campaigns in their history, with the club sitting in 15th place in the Premier League, with only 33 points.

arts.ttl: TEN memorable moments from Man Utd v Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsene Wenger ’s favourite Premier League title triumph was the first of his three and it was won after a historic chase that included a crucial run-in victory at Manchester United . Sylvain Wiltord ’s second-half goal gave Arsenal the victory they needed to win the title - their second under Wenger - and finish their league campaign unbeaten away from home too.

arts.ttl: European giants overtake Arsenal and Man Utd for Nigerian superstar
arts.sum: Osimhen joined Galatasaray last summer on loan for the season from Napoli until June 2025. Juventus have overtaken Arsenal and Man Utd in the race to sign Victor Osimhen this summer.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal send scouts to Italy to watch £70m striker and he scored right in front of them
arts.sum: TBR Football can reveal that Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea have been keeping tabs on Inter Milan striker Marcus Thuram. All three Premier League clubs are...

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard digs out own form for title hopefuls Arsenal
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has just five goal contributions to his name in 19 Premier League appearances for Arsenal in the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'reach agreement with new sporting director' after devising four-man shortlist to replace Edu
arts.sum: Edu was hired in 2019 as technical director before he saw a promotion to sporting director role and has been a key element to Arsenal's success throughout the past campaigns.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United host Arsenal at Old Trafford in a huge Premier League clash on Super Sunday on March 9, live on Sky Sports.
